title: Security Gate — local setup
docker_skip: Docker not found (optional; needed for demos and Semgrep Docker fallback)
semgrep_ok: Semgrep CLI detected (optional; faster Tier-1 scans)
semgrep_skip: Semgrep not on PATH (optional; MCP can use Docker fallback)
npm_dry: Would run: npm install in mcp-server/ (use without --dry-run)
symlink_manual: Could not create symlink. On Windows enable Developer Mode or run as Administrator, or copy the repo into ~/.cursor/plugins/local/security-gate manually.
step_plugin: 2) Cursor → Settings → Plugins → enable Security Gate (local).
step_mcp: 3) If MCP is not auto-loaded, add security-gate to ~/.cursor/mcp.json (see examples/mcp.snippet.json).
keys_none: Tier-1 path: no LLM keys required for intel_refresh, layer2_brief, handbrake_scan, semgrep_scan (host or Docker), llamafirewall_advisor (advisor).
keys_free: Free-first LLM: see docs/FREE_VS_PAID_LLM.md — OpenRouter (Anthropic-compatible) for Shannon/DeepSec; Groq for Crucible. Export ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN + ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL or GROQ_API_KEY per that doc.
keys_paid: Paid LLM: OpenAI / Anthropic / Vercel AI Gateway — see docs/API_KEY_ACQUISITION.md for exact env vars per tool.
